items.summary: Redesign the bottom navigation bar in BottomNavigation.tsx and StaffAppLayout.tsx (and PatientAppLayout.tsx) into a floating container that is positioned fixed at the bottom with 16–20px horizontal margin, 12–16px bottom margin, and borderRadius: 24. The container must not scroll with content, must not allow content to overlap it, and must respect safe area insets on both iOS and Android.

Apply a frosted-glass background to the floating bottom navigation using a BlurView component (intensity 60–80, tint: 'light'). Add a fallback solid background of rgba(255,255,255,0.9) for environments where BlurView is not supported. Add a subtle border (borderWidth: 1, borderColor: rgba(255,255,255,0.3)) and a soft shadow (shadowColor: #000, shadowOpacity: 0.08, shadowRadius: 12, shadowOffset: { width: 0, height: 6 }, elevation: 10 for Android).

Style the active tab in the bottom navigation with a soft gradient pill background using colors #0D47A1 → #26C6DA, a white icon, and a slight scale animation (scale 1.05–1.1). Inactive tab icons should use color #94A3B8. Add a smooth transition animation when switching between tabs.

Preserve all existing role-based visibility logic in the bottom navigation (roleNavConfig-driven nav items per role). Do not break any existing routing. Ensure there is no layout shift or content flicker while scrolling with the new floating nav in place.
